ticker_items: Iran effectively shuts down Strait of Hormuz, blocking 20% global oil flow
Israeli airstrikes continue targeting Beirut and Hezbollah strongholds
US-Israeli strikes kill over 1,300 civilians in first 12 days
Iranian drones hit US Embassy in Riyadh after massive air campaign
FBI warns California police of potential Iranian drone retaliation attacks

new_entrant.text: Ecuador faces U.S. military action as Trump authorizes operations in the latest country to experience American military might.

middle_east.description: IDF executes precision strikes across Lebanon targeting Hezbollah strongholds in southern Beirut.
Iranian drones strike US Embassy in Riyadh causing limited fire and minor material damage.
US-Israeli airstrikes hit Iranian targets including a school where over 170 people were killed.

ukraine.text: Put more pressure on Putin, 'not on me'
ukraine.speaker: Volodymyr Zelenskyy
ukraine.title: President of Ukraine

middle_east.text: I think, overall, what's accomplished is remarkable
middle_east.speaker: John Fetterman
middle_east.title: Democratic Senator

observers.description: Prime Minister Albanese has deployed Australian troops to the Middle East, with Senator Nick McKim warning that Australia is helping the US 'rain down horror' on Iran. Australia has been criticized for hitching itself to the US-Israeli conflict through military support.

Pretoria is performing an awkward diplomatic dance between Washington and Tehran as the Iran war intensifies. South Africa is attempting to navigate between competing pressures from both sides while maintaining strategic relationships.

China is strengthening its influence over North Korea through new infrastructure projects and increased investment. Beijing is also rebuilding its grip on Pyongyang as tensions rise globally, while controlling critical warfare technologies including drone components.

financial.notes: Oil prices rising as Iran effectively halts traffic through Strait of Hormuz, blocking 20% of global crude oil and natural gas flows.

update_log.text: Iran effectively shuts down vital Strait of Hormuz chokepoint, blocking 20% of global oil and gas flows
Israeli forces continue precision airstrikes targeting Hezbollah strongholds across Beirut and southern Lebanon
Iranian drones strike US Embassy in Riyadh in retaliation for US-Israeli air campaign
FBI warns California police departments of possible Iranian drone attacks in retaliation for joint strikes
US-Israeli strikes kill over 1,300 civilians in first 12 days of Iran war, hitting over 10,000 civilian sites
